app.title: Commute
language.label: Language
location.prompt_body: We use your location to find the nearest stops. Your location is not stored.
location.search_error: Couldn't find that place. Try a more specific name.
location.permission_denied_body: Type a place name below to find nearby stops.
location.geolocation_unsupported: Your browser doesn't support location services. Type a place name below.
stops.empty_body: We couldn't find any stops within a 10-minute walk. Try a different location, or widen the search area.
stops.fallback_notice: Using straight-line distance — routing service is offline.
stops.error_body: We couldn't load the nearby stops. Check your connection and try again.
theme.label: Theme
